name: That Time Only Taken Girls Want Me, While Single Girls Want Nothing To Do With Me, Its Crazy Because Here I Am Just Minding My Business And I'm Getting Accosted By Women Who Already Have A Romantic Partner, What's Worse Is The Single Women Think I'm Some S
description:
NETORI PROTAGONIST RIZZ SIMULATOR

THE HIGHER YOUR RIZZ, THE HOTTER THE WOMEN YOU ATTRACT

THEIR PARTNERS START OFF OBLIVIOUS BUT START TO SUSPECT IF YOU "INDULGE"

ONLY TAKEN WOMEN WANT YOU. SINGLE WOMEN THINK YOU ARE CREEPY, PERVERTED, AND A PREDATOR

SUFFERING FROM SUCCESS, I GUESS

OPEN WORLD SANDBOX WITH SOME OPTIONAL STARTS:

SCENARIOS

1. THE POLICE OFFICER 

You got pulled over for what looks like speeding. After she gets a look at your face, maybe she'll let you off with a warning if you get her off 😏 (Ignore the ring on her finger)

2. THE HIGH-POWERED EXECUTIVE

Implied that you're one of her employees but you could simply be a guy in the right place at the wrong time. She just successfully closed a contract, securing millions of dollars in revenue for the company she works for and needs to blow off some steam. Her hubby is busy out of town and she's frustrated.

3. THE NURSE DUO (Credit to @BaldrickAlpha and @Crimson_Torres)

You're in a hospital for a routine examination when two nurses arrive to give you your "physical" 😉  Now, you may or not be there for possible ED, in which one thinks you need medication. The other thinks you're lying about your possible condition 😏
creator: _Mavuika_
